note: Aliases: image, img. 'src' is required (alias 'path'). Image source resolved via ImageSource — accepts file path, URL, data-URI, or raw bytes. SVGs auto-generate a PNG fallback.

width.description: EMU-parseable. If omitted, derived from height + native aspect ratio or defaults to 6in.

height.description: EMU-parseable. If omitted, derived from width + native aspect ratio or defaults to 4in.

fallback.description: optional PNG fallback for SVG sources. When omitted, a 1x1 transparent PNG is generated.

alt.description: alternative text (DocProperties.Description). Defaults to the source file name on add. Aliases: alttext, description.
